answer: Yes. Both the learned calibrator and the preserved legacy heuristic beat the naive carryover baselines on this broad Mars FD basket, although the legacy heuristic remains the single best proxy here.
question: Does the frozen v2 model family carry signal into a broad unseen Mars surface-to-orbit Forbush-decrease basket?
